releaseBody:
(AI Generated).

## Freed v26.7.301-dev

--ready closeout flag to worktree-publish so finished PRs leave draft, structured window_destroyed kill records (stability P0-02), and bound social loop diagnostics parsing

### Features

- --ready closeout flag to worktree-publish so finished PRs leave draft
- Scripts/doctor.mjs machine preflight for loops and worktree helpers
- Structured window_destroyed kill records (stability P0-02)

### Fixes

- Make runtime-health rotation compile on Linux by scoping libc to cfg(unix)
- Mirror runtime-health into the soak dir so rotation cannot shrink the evidence window
- Make the CI perf regression gate actually fail on regressions

### Follow-ups

- Move automation loop state out of /tmp and auto-record merge outcomes
- Loop counters , cloud uploads w/ heads-unchanged, relay broadcasts, worker INITs, scrape outcomes (stability P0-03)
- Check in soak collector and soak-assert with machine-readable verdict
- Daily runtime-health rotation replacing the 5 MiB halving cap (stability P0-04)
- Single-source provider-visible path list with publish-time enforcement (W1-06)

### Downloads

**macOS:** `.dmg` (Apple Silicon or Intel, signed + notarized)  
**Windows:** `.exe` (NSIS installer)  
**Linux:** `.AppImage`  

> macOS downloads are signed and notarized for normal Gatekeeper installation.
